text: Linh khi mong manh chay qua kinh mach nhu suong som dau nui.
Nguoi dieu tuc that cham de dan dien lang xuong.
Than the nhe nhu la kho va tam thuc bat dau nghe duoc tieng linh khi.
Chien thang nho be cung du de dao tam them vung.
Linh luc tan loan nen nguoi lui lai de giu lay can co.
Nen mong Truc Co rung len tung nhip nhu trong dong sau.
Linh khi khong con tan man ma ket thanh dong chay on dinh.
Dao co thanh hinh va moi hoi tho deu keo theo tieng vang cua nen mong moi.
Mot chien thang nua khac sau vao nen dao co.
Nen mong dao co chiu chan dong nhung chua sup do.
Trong dan dien co anh kim quang tu lai roi hop.
Kim dan con chua tron day nhung da toa ap luc tram on.
Kim dan ket thanh va linh ap quet qua bon phia.
Kim dan rung khe nhu dap lai chien y vua tan.
Kim dan am dam nen nguoi can be quan on lai chan nguyen.
Than hon roi than the nua buoc roi lai quay ve dan dien.
Nguyen anh mo mat va mot niem da co the cham den may troi.
Than thuc thu ve nen tran nay da nam trong tinh toan.
Nguyen anh rung dong nen than thuc can duoc an duong.
Than thuc hoa vao thien dia roi gom ve nhu song trieu.
Than y hop voi troi dat va mot buoc da khac pham nhan.
Chien truong lang di nhu bi than niem ep xuong.
Than niem tan di nen nguoi lui mot buoc de giu dao tam.
Linh quang phien nhien nhu loi moi tu ngoai thanh khong.
Thien mon mo he va tien lo khong con la truyen thuyet.
Mot tran chien qua di nhu hat bui truoc cua troi.
Tien lo gap song nhung dao tam van chua tan.
